driver_explanation: Revenue grew abnormally fast year-over-year. High sales growth is the #1 predictor in the Beneish model because companies faking revenue show sudden spikes.
news_summary: Securities class action filed 2022 (SDNY) for misleading statements about Ublituximab/Umbralisib clinical trials. Company withdrew BLA after survival data showed problems. However, the 83.9x M-Score is driven by legitimate BRIUMVI drug launch revenue, not manipulation. FY2025 showed strong execution and raised 2026 guidance.
current_status: Likely false positive. Thriving company, real drug revenue.

driver_explanation: Total accruals are unusually high relative to cash flow. This means reported earnings far exceed actual cash coming in. Big gap between paper profits and real money.
news_summary: Active securities fraud investigations by Levi & Korsinsky and Pomerantz LLP (late 2024). Triggered by Q3 2024 earnings miss: reported $2.9M revenue vs. $4.8M consensus. Stock fell 22.87% in one day. TATA score of 2.816 means reported earnings far exceed cash flow.

driver_explanation: Revenue grew abnormally fast year-over-year. High sales growth is the #1 predictor in the Beneish model because companies faking revenue show sudden spikes.
news_summary: No fraud or investigation found. FY2025 showed 90%+ YoY revenue growth from ZORYVE dermatology launches. Cash position $221.3M. The 16.2x sales growth is legitimate new product revenue.
current_status: Likely false positive. Healthy growth-stage biotech.

driver_explanation: Accounts receivable grew much faster than revenue. This often means revenue is being booked before cash is collected, or fictitious sales are being recorded.
news_summary: Going concern doubt disclosed June 2025. Faced Nasdaq delisting August 2025 for failing $2.5M minimum stockholders equity. Regained compliance February 2026 after restructuring. Was victim of a $1.3M criminal fraud (funds misdirected to fraudulent account). DSRI of 8.7x means receivables grew far faster than revenue.
current_status: Going concern. Near-delisting. Financial distress confirmed.

driver_explanation: Total accruals are unusually high relative to cash flow. This means reported earnings far exceed actual cash coming in. Big gap between paper profits and real money.
news_summary: Actively delisted from Nasdaq. Trading suspended March 18, 2026. Going concern: $4M cash vs. $61M debt, $209.9M accumulated deficit. CFO departed August 2025 "without cause." Being acquired by Agero for $5.50/share. Shareholder investigations into whether board breached fiduciary duties in merger.
current_status: DELISTED March 2026. Going concern. CFO departed.

driver_explanation: Revenue grew abnormally fast year-over-year. High sales growth is the #1 predictor in the Beneish model because companies faking revenue show sudden spikes.
news_summary: Securities fraud class action (2023, Oregon) after Grizzly Research alleged fabricated partnership with ESI in Australia. Revenue collapsed from $6.3M (2024) to $1.6M (2025). Accumulated deficit $845.8M. Only $0.8M unrestricted cash mid-2025. Selling products below cost. Bankruptcy probability estimated ~26%.

driver_explanation: Accounts receivable grew much faster than revenue. This often means revenue is being booked before cash is collected, or fictitious sales are being recorded.
news_summary: Two waves of securities fraud class actions. First (2023): "automated" manufacturing lines actually required massive manual intervention; machines rated 550 batteries/hour produced ~100. Second (2024-2025): battery samples shipped to Honor failed specifications. Active investigations by Block & Leviton, Pomerantz, Bragar Eagel & Squire.

driver_explanation: Gross margins deteriorated significantly. Companies under pressure to meet earnings targets may manipulate revenue or costs to mask declining fundamentals.
news_summary: Clinical trial principal investigator fabricated email correspondence provided to FDA. Failed to follow informed consent protocols. Stock fell 63.8% in one day (June 29, 2023). Faced Nasdaq delisting TWICE: bid price (regained via reverse split Feb 2025) and market value (regained Sept 2025). Going concern. Closed $8M offering March 2026 to stay funded.
current_status: Fabricated FDA data. Delisted twice, regained twice. Going concern.

driver_explanation: Accounts receivable grew much faster than revenue. This often means revenue is being booked before cash is collected, or fictitious sales are being recorded.
news_summary: DSRI of 5.91x means receivables grew nearly 6x faster than revenue. Large biotech with $156M revenue but persistent cash flow challenges typical of clinical-stage companies.

driver_explanation: Asset quality declined sharply. The company may be capitalizing expenses (turning costs into assets) to inflate earnings.
news_summary: AQI of 10.13x means asset quality declined sharply. Solar inverter company facing industry headwinds. No fraud allegations found but financial metrics deteriorating.

news_summary: Oil pipeline company. Previously responsible for the 2021 Huntington Beach oil spill (California). Paid $13M in damages. No accounting fraud found but operational risk is significant.

driver_explanation: Asset quality declined sharply. The company may be capitalizing expenses (turning costs into assets) to inflate earnings.
news_summary: CONFIRMED multi-year financial restatement. Audit committee independent investigation (March 2022) found material weaknesses in internal controls. FY2019, FY2020, and interim periods 2019-2021 ALL restated for revenue recognition errors (FOB destination terms) and inventory cost expensing. Filed Form 8-K declaring non-reliance on prior financials.
current_status: 6 restatements confirmed. Material weakness in controls. M-Score validated.
